description: Configure the brewhouse Chrome terminal for production monitoring. Organize work-related bookmarks into four folders: 'Compliance', 'Quality & Lab', 'Raw Materials', and 'Telemetry'. Permanently delete all personal bookmarks (ESPN, Netflix, Spotify, Facebook, Reddit, DraftKings, and Twitter). Configure the browser to allow notifications for 'https://www.precisionfermentation.com' and 'https://www.goekos.com'. Set the default page zoom to 125% and the default download location to '/home/ga/Documents/Batch_Logs' without prompting for a location. Create a custom site search for Yakima Chief ('https://shop.yakimachief.com/catalogsearch/result/?q=%s') using the shortcut 'hop'. Set 'https://www.precisionfermentation.com' as the specific page to open on startup.
